title: Meeting Mode: multi-agent collaborative discussion for requirements phase
description: Add Meeting orchestration mode to spec-graph. In the requirements phase (propose/specify), multiple agents (PM, Architect, QA, domain experts) participate in a structured roundtable discussion instead of working sequentially. Agents see each other's contributions, can challenge/question each other, and domain experts can be invited. Facilitator (coordinator) manages rounds and synthesizes output artifacts. Inspired by BMAD persona collaboration, but with broadcast-style interaction instead of sequential handoff.

audit_log.message: meeting mode designed, implementing types + protocol + pack declarations
meeting types + protocol doc + foundation requirements-meeting + ddd domain-modeling-meeting + expert invite protocol + 6 meeting tests. 351/351 tests pass
